name: Peanut-Butter Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the butter and sugars until well mixed.
3. Add the eggs and peanut butter to the mixture; stir until smooth.
4. Gradually add the flour, baking soda, and salt, mixing until a dough forms.
5. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls and place them on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Use a fork to make criss-cross patterns on each ball.
7. Bake for 10 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
Note: Do not overmix the dough, as this can cause toughness in the cookies.
